verdicts.reasoning: The description of SendGrid as an email delivery and marketing platform for sending transactional and marketing email at scale is supported by the homepage content.
The authentication methods listed (api_key, oauth2, basic) are explicitly mentioned in the documentation, confirming the recorded value.
The claim that SendGrid offers a self-serve free tier and allows developers to create API keys without human approval is supported by the pricing page.
The broad REST API surface covering various functionalities is confirmed by the documentation, which details the capabilities of the Web API.
The ability to build integrations today is supported by the public documentation and the availability of self-created API keys on the free tier.
